title: What Is Agentic Coding? How AI Agents Modernize Code
summary: IBM Technology explains agentic coding and its application to legacy code modernization. The video positions AI agents as accelerators for software development that reduce risk and improve DevSecOps outcomes.
writeup: This IBM Technology video defines agentic coding: the use of AI agents to speed software development by automating code comprehension and modernization. It matters because much developer effort goes into understanding legacy code, and agents can cut that time while reducing risk in complex systems. The concrete takeaways: agentic coding draws on multi-agent systems, code refactoring, and automated code review, and it aims to improve DevSecOps outcomes.
